applicability_notes: Direct 1:1 mapping from torch.permute(x, dims) -> ttnn.permute(x, dims). Works on TILE and ROW_MAJOR layouts; arbitrary N-D permutations supported (tests cover 1D-6D). Common surrounding chains observed at call sites: NCHW->NHWC layout conversion (permute (0,2,3,1) + reshape (B,1,H*W,C)) and attention head reordering (reshape (B,S,nH,hd) + permute (0,2,1,3)).

placement_observations.size_descriptor: 4D image activation [B, C, H, W] (SD UNet/VAE sub-block tests, e.g. midblock/crossattn)
placement_observations.source: SD UNet/VAE block tests: ttnn.from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG) followed by ttnn.permute(x, (0,2,3,1))

placement_observations.size_descriptor: 4D image activation [B, C, H, W], full-model / large-resolution paths (full VAE, transformer block, refiner UNet)

condition.value: sub-block test sizes (small feature maps use L1, full-resolution latents use DRAM)

placement_observations.source: SD full-model tests: ttnn.from_torch(..., memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) followed by ttnn.permute(x, (0,2,3,1)); ttnn.reshape(x, (B,1,H*W,C))

placement_observations.size_descriptor: 5D volumetric activation [B, C, T/D, H, W] -> channels-last (UNet3D)
3D audio/sequence tensor [B, C, T], long T (vocoder/HiFi-GAN, conformer)
placement_observations.source: HiFi-GAN/vocoder modules: ttnn.permute(x_bct_tile, (0, 2, 1), memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); ttnn.permute(audio_tt, (0,3,2,1), memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode-mode attention tensor [1, num_heads, batch, kv_lora_rank] (small per-step decode shapes)
placement_observations.source: DeepSeek MLA decode benchmark: ttnn.to_memory_config(tt_attn_out, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG) then ttnn.permute(tt_attn_out_interleaved, (0,2,1,3)); sharded inputs are first converted to L1 interleaved before permute

placement_observations.size_descriptor: MoE expert routing weights [tokens, experts] / [1,1,S,E], small
placement_observations.source: MoE experts: topk weights converted ttnn.to_layout(..., ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT) before ttnn.permute(topk_weights_rm, (3,1,2,0)), then back to TILE_LAYOUT (RM permute path for non-tile-friendly dims)
